overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world western game showing a cowboy character traversing a desert landscape with red sandstone buttes and mesas. The character moves steadily along a dirt path through sparse vegetation toward distant rock formations under a bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley with red sandstone buttes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert terrain toward distant rock formations, with a large butte passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall red sandstone butte with layered rock formations dominating the left side
two prominent rock spires standing together in the distant center
low-lying sagebrush and desert vegetation dotting the sandy ground
flat-topped rock formation visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide desert valley under a bright sun, with a massive red butte on the left and twin rock towers visible in the distance ahead. Sparse desert shrubs dot the sandy trail as the camera follows steadily behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail approaching rocky cliff walls

events.description: wooden utility poles appear along the right side of the path indicating proximity to a settlement

agents.ego_description: continuing along the desert path as the landscape shifts, with cliff walls rising on the right and the large left butte falling behind

entered.detail: wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires marking the path

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the large left butte recedes into the distance while the right-side cliff wall grows more prominent. Wooden utility poles appear along the path, suggesting civilization ahead, while the twin rock towers shift from center to left as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert valley that gradually shifts from an open wilderness toward the outskirts of a settlement. It begins with the character traversing a sandy trail under a bright sun, flanked by a massive red butte on the left and distant twin rock towers ahead. As the character progresses, the large butte recedes into the background while a prominent cliff wall rises on the right side of the path. The scene then evolves as wooden utility poles appear along the trail, signaling a transition toward civilization, while the twin rock towers shift toward the left of the frame.
